title: exacum linearifolium
intro: Exacum linearifolium, also known as Thai jasmine or Thai orchid, is a flowering plant species native to Thailand and other parts of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Exacum linearifolium is often used in teas, infusions, and aromatherapy products to harness its therapeutic properties.
